빌립보서 2:1.content: If therefore there is any exhortation in Christ, if any consolation of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any tender mercies and compassion,

빌립보서 2:2.content: make my joy full by being like-minded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind;

빌립보서 2:3.content: doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit, but in humility, each counting others better than himself;

빌립보서 2:4.content: each of you not just looking to his own things, but each of you also to the things of others.

빌립보서 2:5.content: Have this in your mind, which was also in Christ Jesus,

빌립보서 2:6.content: who, existing in the form of God, didn’t consider equality with God a thing to be grasped,

빌립보서 2:7.content: but emptied himself, taking the form of a servant, being made in the likeness of men.

빌립보서 2:8.content: And being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to the point of death, yes, the death of the cross.

빌립보서 2:9.content: Therefore God also highly exalted him, and gave to him the name which is above every name,

빌립보서 2:10.content: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of those in heaven, those on earth, and those under the earth,

빌립보서 2:11.content: and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

빌립보서 2:12.content: So then, my beloved, even as you have always obeyed, not only in my presence, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

빌립보서 2:13.content: For it is God who works in you both to will and to work, for his good pleasure.

빌립보서 2:14.content: Do all things without complaining and arguing,

빌립보서 2:15.content: that you may become blameless and harmless, children of God without defect in the middle of a crooked and perverse generation, among whom you are seen as lights in the world,

빌립보서 2:16.content: holding up the word of life, that I may have something to boast in the day of Christ, that I didn’t run in vain nor labor in vain.

빌립보서 2:17.content: Yes, and if I am poured out on the sacrifice and service of your faith, I rejoice, and rejoice with you all.

빌립보서 2:18.content: In the same way, you also rejoice, and rejoice with me.

빌립보서 2:19.content: But I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, that I also may be cheered up when I know how you are doing.

빌립보서 2:20.content: For I have no one else like-minded, who will truly care about you.

빌립보서 2:21.content: For they all seek their own, not the things of Jesus Christ.

빌립보서 2:22.content: But you know the proof of him, that as a child serves a father, so he served with me in furtherance of the Good News.

빌립보서 2:23.content: Therefore I hope to send him at once, as soon as I see how it will go with me.

빌립보서 2:24.content: But I trust in the Lord that I myself also will come shortly.

빌립보서 2:25.content: But I counted it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, fellow worker, fellow soldier, and your apostle and servant of my need,

빌립보서 2:26.content: since he longed for you all, and was very troubled because you had heard that he was sick.

빌립보서 2:27.content: For indeed he was sick, nearly to death, but God had mercy on him, and not on him only, but on me also, that I might not have sorrow on sorrow.

빌립보서 2:28.content: I have sent him therefore the more diligently, that when you see him again, you may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.

빌립보서 2:29.content: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all joy, and hold such people in honor,

빌립보서 2:30.content: because for the work of Christ he came near to death, risking his life to supply that which was lacking in your service toward me.
